title: MC Kart Datapack
description: A datapack to go alongside the MC Kart resource pack to add missing boat features!
body:
![The Image of the title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ac51ceed5c20897f60ddb42178a63ae6f0eae9a.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tQOJqNjcYpE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Description**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This datapack may get updated in the future, for which it has some room to improve on.

</details>

This datapack adds in the iconic **Functions** of _Mario Karts_ into vanilla minecraft! Alongside other gadgets to play with!

 ## Additions:
 this datapack adds the following features:
- Allows boats to race across basalt as road
- Banana peels slow down boats
- boat can go up blocks
- mystery blocks give 1 power up (subject to change)
- particals to emmerse the enviorment
